summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge is recommended because none has a complete merge preflight; no replacement fix artifact is emitted because the shard contains multiple unrelated PR paths and the hydrated evidence supports conservative non-mutating classification. The exact security-sensitive linked issue is routed centrally without blocking unrelated non-security PR classification.
